text: I do swear by this city ňĻof Meccaňļ‚ÄĒ
even though you ňĻO Prophetňļ are subject to abuse in this city‚ÄĒ
and by every parent and ňĻtheirňļ child!
Indeed, We have created humankind in ňĻconstantňļ struggle.
Do they think that no one has power over them,
boasting, ‚ÄúI have wasted enormous wealth!‚ÄĚ?
Do they think that no one sees them?
Have We not given them two eyes,
a tongue, and two lips;
and shown them the two ways ňĻof right and wrongňļ?
If only they had attempted the challenging path ňĻof goodness insteadňļ!
And what will make you realize what ňĻattemptingňļ the challenging path is?
It is to free a slave,
or to give food in times of famine
to an orphaned relative
or to a poor person in distress,
and‚ÄĒabove all‚ÄĒto be one of those who have faith and urge each other to perseverance and urge each other to compassion.
These are the people of the right.
As for those who deny Our signs, they are the people of the left. <sup foot_note=1311>1311</sup>

foot_notes.1311: Other s√Ľrahs describing the people of the right and the people of the left include 56 and 69.

text: The Fire will be sealed over them.
